title: Blackmoor 26cm Pancake Pan/Non-Stick Pancake Frying Pan/Suitable for Induction Hob, Electric and Gas Hobs/Crepe Pan, Roti Maker, Omelette Pan, Chapati Pan, Tawa /, Black
features: 26CM PANCAKE PAN – This Blackmoor Classic 26cm pancake pan is a unique kitchen appliance, that will allow you to cook delicious homemade pancakes, as well as others foods such as crepes, omelettes, rotis, and more, all from the comfort of your own kitchen.

NON-STICK COATING – The pancake pan features a non-stick coating that will ensure an efficient release of the pancake from the pan at all times. The pan also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

COOL-TOUCH HANDLE – The crepe and pancake pan features an ergonomic soft grip and cool touch handle that ensures both your comfort and safety when creating foods in the kitchen. The handle also has a conveniently placed hole that allows you to hang up the pan after use.

SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This pancake frying pan is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pan comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Non-Stick 26cm Pancake Pan Blackmoor's Classic range is the flagship offering in its kitchenware arsenal & has been expertly designed for you to cook up a wide range of meals for friends and family. This stylish 26cm pancake pan is compatible with all hob types including electric, gas, and induction. Its hybrid stone coating delivers excellent non-stick performance for easy cleaning while its cool-touch handle allows it to be hung up for storage after use. The video showcases the product in use.
